name: Bug Report
about: Something is broken — let us know
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what went wrong.

**Where did it happen?**
- [ ] Build canvas
- [ ] Process Reporting
- [ ] Dashboard
- [ ] Options / Settings page
- [ ] Other: ______

**Which Boomi Xcel version?**
(Found in `chrome://extensions` under the extension card)

**Which browser?**
- [ ] Chrome
- [ ] Firefox
- [ ] Edge

**Steps to reproduce**
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll to '...'
4. See the error

**Expected behavior**
What you expected to happen instead.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, drag and drop screenshots here.

**Additional context**
Any other info that might help — console errors, other extensions installed, etc.
